cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what the author did when he met Mr. Lee. The passage starts with the author being about ten years old, walking with his mother. They stopped to speak to Mr. Lee. The author thought he could see Mr. Lee anytime in the neighborhood, so he didn't pay attention. Then after passing Mr. Lee, the mother gave her advice. So the key part here is that the author didn't pay attention to Mr. Lee when they met. The mother later scolded him for not speaking. The question is about what the author did at that time. The options are A to D. Let me check the options again. Option D is "He ignored him." Because the author didn't pay any attention, which means he ignored Mr. Lee.
